question: Is your company familiar with the Hong Kong Green Finance Taxonomy (HKMA Taxonomy) and its green definitions for different industries?
hint: The HKMA Taxonomy provides technical screening criteria for green activities in sectors such as power generation, transport, buildings, and water; Phase 2A added manufacturing and ICT

options.label: Yes, understand the HKMA Taxonomy framework and reference it to assess the green eligibility of projects
Partially, aware the taxonomy exists but have not studied it in depth
No, not familiar with green finance taxonomies

question: Is your company familiar with BOCHK's green loan and sustainability-linked loan products and their application requirements?
hint: BOCHK offers green loans (for designated green projects) and sustainability-linked loans (linked to ESG performance targets)

options.label: Yes, understand the product types, application requirements, and required documentation
Partially, aware the products exist but have not reviewed the details
No, not familiar with BOCHK's green finance products

question: Has your company assessed whether its business activities meet the technical screening criteria for green or transition finance?
hint: This includes the DNSH (Do No Significant Harm) principle and minimum safeguards

options.label: Yes, assessed the green eligibility of business activities against Taxonomy criteria
Partially, understand the need for assessment but have not yet conducted one
No, not familiar with technical screening criteria

question: Does your company understand the interconnected framework of Hong Kong's green finance ecosystem (HKMA Taxonomy, HKEX disclosure requirements, bank products)?
hint: The green finance ecosystem operates across three layers: the taxonomy defines what qualifies as green, exchange disclosure requirements drive transparency, and bank products provide the capital

options.label: Yes, fully understand the interconnection across all three layers
Partially, understand some components of the ecosystem
No, not familiar with the green finance ecosystem

question: Has your company published or is it preparing to publish an ESG report in accordance with the HKEX ESG Reporting Code (including climate-related disclosures)?
hint: HKEX Appendix C2 requires listed issuers to publish an ESG report alongside their annual report; Part D mandates climate-related disclosures

options.label: Yes, published a complete ESG report meeting HKEX requirements (including Part D climate disclosures)
Partially, published an ESG report but not fully compliant with HKEX requirements
No, have not published an ESG report
